scripts.dev: echo 'Run dev script in individual packages'
scripts.build: echo 'Run build script in individual packages'
scripts.lint: echo 'Run lint script in individual packages'
scripts.dev:server: npm run prisma:ensure:api && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.dev:analyzer: npm run prisma:ensure:api && npm run dev --workspace=workers/analyzer
scripts.dev:backend: npm run prisma:ensure:api && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api --workspace=workers/analyzer --if-present --parallel
